description: Report-only precision benchmark cases. Inputs stay Simplified Chinese; expected values are manually curated Taiwan Traditional Chinese.

cases.input: 软件开发需要配置文件
cases.notes: IT long phrase and UI/file terminology.
UI login should be Taiwan usage.
Programming term, not generic return.
File system should use 檔案.
Formal document should remain 文件.
Ambiguous 文件 should not be forced to 檔案 without stronger context.
UI action plus file context.
Generic preserve should not become 儲存.
UI location, not generic collecting.
Generic collecting should remain unchanged.
Social follow action.
Generic concern should not become 追蹤.
Physical mass plus unit context.
Generic quality should not always become 品質.
Numeric gram context.
克 inside word must not convert to 公克.

cases.input: 网络协议定义设备之间的通信规则
cases.expected: 網路協議定義設備之間的通訊規則
cases.notes: IT networking context.

cases.input: 前端组件需要支持深色模式
cases.expected: 前端元件需要支援深色模式
cases.notes: Common frontend terminology.
Backend/API terminology.
UI page terminology.

cases.input: 台积电宣布扩大先进制程投资
cases.expected: 台積電宣布擴大先進製程投資
cases.notes: Taiwan proper noun and semiconductor wording.
Taiwan AI wording.

cases.input: 禁用账号和禁用药物不同
cases.expected: 停用帳號和禁用藥物不同
cases.notes: Only account context should become 停用.
UI default.
Admitting by silence should not become 預設.

cases.input: 长发程序员在理发店写程序
cases.expected: 長髮程式設計師在理髮店寫程式
cases.notes: Mixed ambiguity: hair, programmer, haircut, program.

cases.input: 写程序前先看法律程序
cases.expected: 寫程式前先看法律程序
cases.notes: Source regressions/regression_045. Program context should become 程式; legal procedure should remain 程序.
Source wiki/wiki_060. Preserve historical relics should keep 保存, not 儲存.
Source regressions/regression_032. Generic support should remain 支持.

cases.input: 调查显示年轻族群支持远程办公。
cases.expected: 調查顯示年輕族群支持遠端辦公。
cases.notes: Source news/news_065. Support for policy/work style should remain 支持 while 远程办公 becomes 遠端辦公.
Source regressions/regression_034. Marriage partner should remain 對象, not 物件.

cases.input: 我把文件上传到群组了。
cases.expected: 我把文件上傳到群組了。
cases.notes: Source social/social_027. Ambiguous 文件 should not be forced to 檔案.

cases.input: 注销账户不是注销公司
cases.expected: 登出帳戶不是註銷公司
cases.notes: Source regressions/regression_081. Account context should become 登出; company registration context should remain 註銷.
Source regressions/regression_051. Good news should remain 消息, not 訊息.

cases.input: 日志文件记录错误信息。
cases.expected: 日誌文件記錄錯誤資訊。
cases.notes: Source tech/tech_010. 日誌文件 is the corpus expected here; do not over-force 文件 to 檔案.

cases.input: 日志等级可以通过参数调整。
cases.expected: 日誌等級可以透過參數調整。
cases.notes: Source tech/tech_049. Through a parameter should become 透過參數, not 引數 or 通過參數.

cases.input: 央行宣布维持利率政策不变。
cases.expected: 央行宣布維持利率政策不變。
cases.notes: Source news/news_068. News context should keep 宣布, not 宣佈.
